coupDeCoeur.message: Looking for your next favorite piece?

engagement.engagement_1_content: We provide a certificate of authenticity when you acquire an artwork.
engagement.engagement_2_content: Our art advisors are available to assist you with your purchases.
engagement.engagement_3_content: We offer a selection inspired by the African continent.

hero.headline: Artists
hero.description: Explore the works and universe of our artists, unique talents who push the boundaries of creativity.

hero.headline: Exhibitions
hero.description: Immerse yourself in a captivating artistic universe through our unique exhibitions. Explore works that tell stories, evoke emotions, and celebrate creativity in all its forms.

hero.headline: Viewing Room
hero.description: The Viewing Room offers you an immersive experience in our most captivating collections. Whether you're at home or on the go, discover unique works, accompanied by exclusive stories and narratives.

hero.headline: Art News
hero.description: Art News is your daily source for the latest updates in the art scene. From artist interviews to exhibition previews and emerging trends, everything you need to fuel your passion for art is here. Don't miss out on what's making waves in the art world.

hero.headline: About
hero.description: We are dedicated to showcasing talented artists and exceptional works that inspire and move.

newsletter.message: Thank you for subscribing! Stay tuned for our latest updates.
newsletter.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.

copyright.message: Copyright © 2025, Bamako Art Gallery, all rights reserved

photography.title: Photography
photography.description: Photography at Bamako Art Gallery captures the essence of Malian life, its landscapes, traditions, and emotions. This category features works that tell visual stories, highlighting Mali's natural beauty, cultural diversity, and social realities through the lens of talented artists.

design.title: Design
design.description: Design at Bamako Art Gallery embodies innovation and cultural heritage. This category showcases contemporary and artisanal creations that blend aesthetics and functionality while celebrating the traditional craftsmanship of West Africa. Each piece tells a story, reflecting Mali's cultural richness and modernity.

sculpture.title: Sculpture
sculpture.description: Sculpture at Bamako Art Gallery celebrates the transformation of material into art. This category features works in wood, metal, stone, and other materials, reflecting Mali's artistic heritage and the ingenuity of its artisans. Each sculpture invites viewers to explore the shapes, textures, and symbols of Malian culture.

painting.title: Painting
painting.description: Painting at Bamako Art Gallery is an explosion of colors, emotions, and narratives. This category brings together contemporary and traditional works that explore themes of Malian identity, history, and spirituality. Each canvas is a window into the soul and creativity of Malian artists.

contact.hour: Open from Monday to Saturday, from 10H to 18H
contact.street: Baco Djicoroni ACI, Street: 636, Door: 528 Near Sotelma Malitel, Bamako, Mali

maliArt.subline: Mali Art Club is an association dedicated to the promotion and recognition of contemporary Malian art.
